arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappe 'regrets' emerge after Sweden rape allegation
arts.sum: Real Madrid allegedly regret signing Kylian Mbappe on a free transfer from Paris Saint-Germain this summer following an allegation of rape against the France forward.

arts.ttl: Juventus star speaks out on Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Juventus star Andrea Cambiaso has this weekend publicly responded to the recent speculation linking him with a move to Spain, with Real Madrid. The name of versatile defender Cambiaso has…

arts.ttl: Haaland dreams of LaLiga: Will he join Barcelona or Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Indeed, ever since signing for the Premier League champions, speculation about his next move has been rampant, with both Barcelona and Real Madrid the clubs most frequently associated with him. Erling Haaland dreams of moving to Spain at some point in his career, but a transfer is not realistic next summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Celta Vigo vs Real Madrid 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Celta are usually a strong team when playing in front of their fans, so Real Madrid should be ready for battle if they want to earn the three points. Real Madrid travel North to face Celta at Balaidos in the return of LaLiga after this past FIFA break.

arts.ttl: Mbappe’s found out what it’s REALLY like to play for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe might have been a Real Madrid player for over two months, but in the last week, the France star has truly learned what it’s like to be a big name at the Bernabeu. This came days after the Spanish press had joyfully proclaimed that Mbappe had snubbed international duty with France to have a ‘mini pre-season’ due to his unhappiness with his form at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Real Madrid regret Mbappe signing; Man Utd prepare January bid for De Jong
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have joined Liverpool in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen centre-back Jonathan Tah, whose contract expires in the summer. Erik ten Hag wants Manchester United to sign Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong in the January transfer window, assuming he remains in charge.

arts.ttl: Tottenham monitoring “the next Jude Bellingham” closely ahead of potential move
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keen on the Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Bynoe-Gittens. The 20-year-old has established himself as an important team player for the German club and his performances have attracted the attention of the top European clubs. According to a report from Football Insider, Tottenham are monitoring him closely and the report has dubbed […] The post Tottenham monitoring “the next Jude Bellingham” closely ahead of potential move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Galicia to face Celta Vigo on Saturday night in the club's first game after October's international break. CM: Eduardo Camavinga - Real Madrid's fearsome French midfielder made his club debut against Celta Vigo back in 2021, marking the occasion with a goal.

arts.ttl: Celta Vigo vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Celta Vigo host reigning Spanish and European champions Real Madrid as La Liga gets back underway on Saturday night. Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Celta Vigo (4-3-3) : Courtois; Vazquez, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy; Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham; Rodrygo, Mbappe, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti assistants considering Real Madrid exit
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti’s managerial career in expected to end in the next two years. He is contracted at Real Madrid until 2026, and upon leaving the reigning European and La Liga champions, he is expected to announce his retirement from football. For now, Ancelotti does not thinking about his retirement, but it appears that his assistants […] The post Carlo Ancelotti assistants considering Real Madrid exit appeared first on Football España.
